nasb.text: The king and all the people who were with him arrived weary and he refreshed himself there.

esv.text: And the king, and all the people who were with him, arrived weary at the Jordan. And there he refreshed himself.

cnv.text: 王和所有與他在一起的人到了一個地方，都覺得累了，就在那裡舒展一下。

ccb.text: 王和众人来到约旦河边时，疲惫不堪，便在那里歇息。
